name: Pockets of Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 oz) chopped green chilies, drained or 2 T finely chopped jalapenos
8 oz Monterey Jack cheese, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop tomatoes in a food processor.
2. Add beans, yogurt, cumin, oregano, parsley, and garlic; process for 10 to 15 seconds or until beans are mashed. Set aside.
3. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off.
4. In a large bowl, combine 1-1/2 cups flour, sugar, salt, and yeast; mix well.
5. In a small saucepan, heat water and oil until very warm (120 to 130 degrees).
6. Add the warm liquid and egg to the flour mixture; blend at low speed until moistened. Beat for 3 minutes at medium speed.
7. Add the bean mixture; beat until well mixed.
8. By hand, stir in green chilies and an additional 3-1/2 to 4 cups flour to form a stiff dough.
9. On a floured or cornmeal-coated surface, knead in 1/2 to 1 cup flour for about 5 minutes or until the dough is smooth and elastic.
10. Place the dough in a greased bowl; cover loosely with greased plastic wrap and cloth towel. Let rise in a warm place (80 to 85 degrees) for 45 to 60 minutes or until light and doubled in size.
11. Grease two 8 or 9 inch round cake pans or one large cookie sheet.
12. Punch down the dough. Divide it into half; shape each half into a 6 inch round loaf.
13. Place the loaves in the greased pans.
14. Using a sharp knife, cut 1-1/2 inches from the edge to make a deep ring around each loaf to the bottom.
15. Cut another deep ring 1 inch from the first cut.
16. Insert cheese cubes into the cuts; pinch edges to completely seal.
17. Cover; let rise in a warm place for 30 to 40 minutes or until light and almost doubled in size.
18. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
19. Uncover the dough and bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until loaves are deep golden brown and sound hollow when lightly tapped.
20. Immediately remove from pans; cool on wire racks.
Note: This bread can be frozen. Thaw at room temperature. To reheat, preheat oven to 375 degrees. Wrap loaf in foil; bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until hot.
